summary: Cash Settlement Feature Testing Complete - All backend endpoints and frontend UI verified. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified including settlement card, status badges, handover dialog, confirm dialog, and dispute dialog.

minor.issue: Fixed: Query was using 'payment_date' field but payments use 'created_at' field

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in get_daily_payment_totals() - was querying 'payment_date' but payments collection uses 'created_at' field
seed_data_creation: Created test cash payment (₹1,500) and completed full settlement flow for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cash Settlement feature fully tested. All 6 endpoints verified: GET /settlements/today, POST /settlements/handover, POST /settlements/{id}/confirm, POST /settlements/{id}/dispute, GET /settlements/pending, GET /settlements/history. Full settlement flow tested: pending -> handed_over -> settled. UI components verified on both Assistant and Therapist dashboards.

GET_settlements_today.notes: Returns today's settlement status with auto-calculated cash/online amounts

POST_settlements_handover.notes: Assistant can mark cash as handed over (only when cash_amount > 0)

POST_settlements_confirm.notes: Therapist can confirm receipt and lock record

POST_settlements_dispute.notes: Therapist can report issue (requires reason min 5 chars)

GET_settlements_history.notes: Returns settlement audit trail with date range

assistant_dashboard_settlement_card.notes: Cash Settlement card displays on Assistant Dashboard Overview with correct amounts and status

settlement_status_badges.notes: Status badge changes correctly: Pending (amber), Awaiting Confirmation (blue), Settled (green), Disputed (red)

therapist_pending_settlement_banner.notes: Therapist sees pending settlement banner when status is 'handed_over' with Confirm/Dispute buttons

confirm_dialog.notes: Confirm dialog shows amount, assistant name, date, note, and lock warning

dispute_dialog.notes: Dispute dialog requires reason input (min 5 chars) with validation

settlement_locking.notes: Once confirmed, settlement record is locked and cannot be modified

auto_calculated_amounts.notes: Cash and online amounts are auto-calculated from payments collection

online_auto_settled.notes: Online payments (UPI, card, bank) are shown as auto-settled
